question: List all the pairs of buyer first names and product names.
sql: SELECT Customers.customer_first_name, Products.product_name FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Orders.customer_id JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id JOIN Products ON Order_Items.product_id = Products.product_id;

back_translation.intent: 获取客户及其订单中的产品信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求列出买家名字和产品名字的配对，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、涉及的表和列均与之匹配，没有过滤、聚合、分组或排序要求，语义完全一致。
